name: Half a Favor
text:
Target opponent gains 1 life. You create half a Favor token. (Tear a Favor token in half, or if you don't have one, owe yourself half of one. Two halves make a Favor; nobody at the table is allowed to check your math.)
Half-favors are the most dangerous kind. You can never be sure if you're square.
flavorText: "You only did me half a favor." "Then you only owe me half a kneecap."
